title: carduus defloratus subsp. carduelis
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. carduelis, also known as the wild cardoon or a type of wild thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, menstrual cramps, and skin infections. The health benefits of Carduus defloratus subsp. carduelis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
